description:
You are an IT Project Manager at TailwindTraders responsible for ensuring a sustainable sprint. Sprint 1 is currently overloaded and lacks a capacity plan. Set realistic daily capacity for team members in Sprint 1 and reassign at least two lower-priority work items to Sprint 2. Ensure Priority 1 bugs and high-priority user stories remain in Sprint 1. For each deferred item, add a comment explaining the reason for the move.

Login URL: http://localhost/DefaultCollection
Username: Docker
Password: GymAnything123!

sprint1_items: Implement product inventory search with full-text filtering
Design REST API rate limiting and authentication middleware
Product price calculation returns incorrect values for bulk discount tiers
API returns 500 error when filtering products with special characters in category name
Inventory count becomes negative after concurrent stock deduction requests
